items.name: Root
items.desc: Background fill and padding of the player.

fields.name: backgroundColor
desc: Background fill of the whole player.
Accepts `#RGB` / `#RGBA` / `#RRGGBB` / `#RRGGBBAA`, `rgb(r, g, b)` or `rgba(r, g, b, a)` (a in 0..1).

fields.name: paddingX
desc: Horizontal padding on each side of the content.
A bare number or `px` is absolute; `%` is relative to the viewport width.
